summary: Jerry delivers a fiery performance on "Loser"; recording quality not specified
review: The sole reviewer raves about Jerry Garcia’s incendiary playing, especially on the song “Loser,” giving the show a strong musical highlight. No details are provided about the source or clarity of the recording, so its technical quality remains unknown.
